title: hieracium jurassicum subsp. subperfoliatum
intro: Hieracium jurassicum subsp. subperfoliatum, also known as a subspecies of the Hieracium jurassicum plant, is a type of flowering plant in the dandelion family (Asteraceae). The plant has been used in traditional herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. It is believed to provide health benefits such as reducing inflammation and improving digestion, as well as exhibiting antimicrobial and antifungal properties. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of teas, tinctures, or infusions, and it can also be consumed raw as a salad green or used as a garnish.
